mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volunteer_orders ( id, request_id, volunteer_id, volunteer_name, help_seeker_id, help_seeker_name, help_seeker_phone, type, title, description, location, status, accepted_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{requestId}, #{volunteerId}, #{volunteerName}, #{helpSeekerId}, #{helpSeekerName}, #{helpSeekerPhone}, #{type}, #{title}, #{description}, #{location}, #{status}, #{acceptedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_duration), 0) FROM volunteer_orders WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = 'completed' AND actual_duration IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_orders SET status = #{status}, feedback = #{feedback}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE volunteer_orders SET status = #{status}, started_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'in-progress' AND started_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE started_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE volunteer_orders SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), feedback = #{feedback}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_orders WHERE status = 'completed' AND completed_at IS NOT NULL AND DATE(completed_at) = #{day}

SELECT volunteer_id AS volunteerId, volunteer_name AS volunteerName, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM volunteer_orders WHERE status = 'completed' AND completed_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at >= #{start} AND completed_at < #{end} GROUP BY volunteer_id, volunteer_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
